items.title: Trump warns Taiwan against declaring independence, hours after summit with China's Xi
items.summary: The US president says he wants Beijing and Taipei to "cool down" tensions over the self-governing island.

items.title: Trump and Xi conclude 'very successful' talks but few deals confirmed
items.summary: There were plenty of choreographed ceremonies but no trade breakthroughs after the two-day visit.

items.title: Trump says 20-year nuclear programme suspension by Iran would be enough
items.summary: The US president says Tehran has to show "real" commitment to removing nuclear fuel and stopping uranium enrichment.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 馬爾地夫洞穴潛水5死 唯一倖存者逃死劫原因曝光
items.summary: 馬爾地夫瓦武環礁14日有5人進行水下洞穴探險時身亡，同行的第6人為義大利熱那亞大學女學生，她原本也要下去潛水，但當天不知為何選擇留在船上，就此逃過死劫。  據《紐約郵報》報導...…

items.title: 白宮通報未提台灣、川普北京稱習近平「朋友」 MAGA鷹派轉沉默
items.summary: 曾多次公開抨擊中國「掠奪美國」的美國總統川普，本週訪問北京期間稱習近平是「朋友」，並表示美中關係將「比以往更好」。英國廣播公司（BBC）指出，川普對中語氣出現明顯調整，而過去一...…

items.title: 泰國出土東南亞最大恐龍化石 體長27公尺大到連掠食者都怕
items.summary: 科學家在泰國東北猜也奔府（Chaiyaphum）發現新種恐龍「猜也奔那伽泰坦龍」（Nagatitan chaiyaphumensis），這是目前已知東南亞體型最大的恐龍化石。這隻...…
